mods.title: Ultra HD Graphics Overhaul
mods.description: Transform your gameplay with the Ultra HD Graphics Overhaul. This mod completely retextures the base game environments, adding 4K textures, improved lighting effects, and realistic weather patterns. Experience the world like never before with volumetric fog, enhanced shadows, and ray-tracing support for compatible hardware.
mods.shortDescription: Complete overhaul of the interface for...
mods.author: CyberNinja99

changes: Fixed lighting glitches in the northern forest region during nighttime.
Optimized rain particle effects for better performance on mid-range devices.
Added new cloud textures for stormy weather conditions.

comments.comment: Honestly the best graphics mod out there right now. My frame rate barely dropped!
Can you please update the water shaders? They look a bit weird at sunset. Otherwise perfect!
